description: Pasabahce, glass production from 1001 Nights. As one of the largest glass producers worldwide, glass products are produced in all shapes and colours.Manufacturing is partly manual, partly Industrial and always unusual and as if from the Arabian Nights.Meanwhile, products are produced for households and professional users, such as hotels, restaurants and restaurants. The brand Paşabahçe is named after the neighbourhood in Istanbul where the first glass factory was established in 1935.The brand now belongs to Sisecam Holding, who in addition to glass products also sell crystal items and porcelain. Paşabahçecake plate, cake plate "Patisserie" with base. Article 95117 "top". Cake plate, cake plate from the series Patisserie. Dishwasher-safe. Microwave-safe. Tempered glass: resistant and longer service life. Excellent for pies, cakes, muffin, particles, cupcake, fruit, and more. Round glass top with fully edged wavy glass border, with base. Diameter: 32 cm. Height: 12.5 cm. Border upwards. Also suitable for hotels and restaurants. - - - - Quality item.
